name: little-english-h5
description: A static H5 English learning app for young children.

scripts.cap:copy: npm run prepare:apk:debug && npx cap copy android
scripts.cap:copy:release: npm run prepare:apk:release && npx cap copy android
scripts.cap:open: npm run cap:copy && npx cap open android
scripts.build:release: npm run cap:copy:release && cd android && JAVA_HOME='/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home' GRADLE_USER_HOME='../.gradle-cache' ANDROID_USER_HOME='../.android-user-home' ./gradlew --no-daemon assembleRelease bundleRelease
scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check scripts/generate-audio.js && node --check scripts/prepare-capacitor-web.js
